notes:
Tested:

- Normal gameplay up to the first fight. Including 1 movie, a visual novel sequence and a battle.

- Options menu.

- Saving the game.

Glitches:

- Major graphical glitches, to fix: go to settings, enable compatibility mode. 

- Movies don't work.
title: Evenicle

notes: Tested: - Normal gameplay up to the first fight. Including 1 movie, a visual novel sequence and a battle. - Options menu. - Saving the game. Glitches: - Major graphical glitches, to fix: go to settings, enable compatibility mode. - Movies don't work. - Very occasional crashes. Save often.
title: Evenicle

notes:
Runs nearly perfectly out of the box. Cannot play movies, but doesn't crash on the playback error message (look up the video elsewhere if you really need to see it). Watching terminal window if running through a script, you will see what seem to be overflow errors after a length of time spent in the game which will eventually lead to a crash, but this takes place after about 2+ hours of play. Save often if you're paranoid.

Also tested on a tablet using a Core m7 with an Intel 515 graphics chip running Arch, also no problems.
title: Evenicle
